response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior/mid role. Strong technical fit on TypeScript, React, Node, and AWS, but severely overqualified — high flight risk, likely salary mismatch, and probable boredom with junior-level scope. Berlin location and German basic proficiency align, but PostgreSQL/Nest.js are not explicitly shown (MongoDB is primary DB experience).
strengths: Deep TypeScript, Node.js, React fullstack experience well beyond requirements
Berlin-based with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and AI/LLM tooling exposure
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture mindset
concerns: Massively overqualified — staff-level engineer for an entry-level seat
No demonstrated PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience (MongoDB-heavy)
High attrition risk and likely compensation mismatch with junior band
